meta.title: Life Code Test
meta.description: Scientifically evaluate your habits and predict your life expectancy

home.title: 🧬 Life Code Test
home.subtitle: Evaluate your lifestyle scientifically, predict your life expectancy
home.description: Through 48 science-based questions across 6 dimensions — sleep, diet, exercise, mental health, body metrics, and lifestyle — get a complete analysis of your health status with personalized recommendations.

features.f1: Science-Based — WHO data & Framingham Heart Study
features.f2: Smart Branching — Dynamic questions based on your answers
features.f3: Visual Report — Radar + Bar charts for multi-dimension analysis
features.f4: Actionable Tips — Know how long you'll live AND how to live longer

welcome.title: 👋 Welcome to the Life Expectancy Test!
welcome.subtitle: Please select your preferred language before we begin
welcome.hint: 💡 Tip: You can switch languages anytime
welcome.disclaimer: * This test is for entertainment only, not medical advice

tips.almost: Last few questions! Hang in there! 🎯
tips.sleepEarly: Sleeping before 11 PM is best for your body!
tips.drinkWater: Adults need at least 1.5L of water daily~
tips.exerciseMore: At least 150 min/week of moderate exercise is ideal!

loading.title: ⏳ Analyzing your data...
loading.subtitle: Please wait while we calculate your life expectancy

result.title: Test Complete!
congrats: 🎉 Congratulations on completing your self-discovery journey!
No matter the result, it's never too late to change! 🌟
Knowing your body is the first step to a healthy life! ❤️

S.name: Longevity Elite 🏆
S.description: Your habits are excellent! Regular sleep, balanced diet, consistent exercise, and calm mind — you're the 'health guru' in your social circle. At this rate, you could become a centenarian!

A.name: Health Optimizer ✨
A.description: Your habits are generally good! Most indicators are within healthy ranges. With minor optimizations in some details, you can level up. Keep it up — your second half will be exciting!

B.name: Balanced Stabilizer ⚖️
B.description: Your habits are average. Some good, some bad — like most people. The good news: huge room for improvement! Small adjustments can make a big difference!

C.name: Improvement Needed ⚠️
C.description: Hmm... some habits may be quietly stealing your years. But don't worry! Realizing this is the first step to change. Even fixing just one or two bad habits can significantly extend your healthy years.

D.name: Risk Alert 🚨
D.description: Alert! ⚠️ Some of your lifestyle choices may be accelerating your life depletion. But remember — it's never too late! Starting today, every small step is a giant leap toward longevity!

suggestions.title: 🎯 Personalized Improvement Plan
suggestions.subtitle: Based on your test results, we've customized these improvement strategies

sleep.title: 🛌 Sleep Improvement

items.text: Go to bed 30 minutes earlier, gradually adjusting to before 11 PM
Stay away from screens 1 hour before bed; read or listen to soft music instead
Keep bedroom dark and quiet; use blackout curtains and earplugs
Maintain consistent sleep schedule; don't vary more than 1 hr on weekends

sleep.expectedBenefit: Optimizing sleep fully can add +1.6 years

diet.title: 🥗 Diet Improvement

items.text: Add 2 servings of vegetables daily (~300g), with color variety
Reduce sugary drinks and desserts to max 2 times per week
Replace frying/grilling with steaming, boiling, or stewing
Eat breakfast every day! It's the most important meal

diet.expectedBenefit: Optimizing diet fully can add +2.0 years

exercise.title: 🏃 Exercise Improvement

items.text: Start with 30-min walks daily, progress to 3x40min moderate exercise weekly
Stand up every hour for 5 min to reduce sedentary risks
Add strength training 1-2x weekly to protect bones and muscles
Try new exercise types; finding what you enjoy makes it sustainable

exercise.expectedBenefit: Increasing exercise fully can add +2.5 years

mental.title: 🧠 Mental Health

items.text: Learn meditation or deep breathing; practice 10 minutes daily
Maintain regular contact with family and friends; build a support system
Cultivate an absorbing hobby (gardening, art, music, etc.)
Identify stress sources; learn to say 'no' and set boundaries

mental.expectedBenefit: Mental wellness optimization can add +1.8 years

lifestyle.title: 🏡 Lifestyle Changes

items.text: Quitting smoking is one of the most effective ways to extend life; it's never too late
Control alcohol: max 2 drinks/day for men, 1 for women
Get annual comprehensive checkups; early detection saves lives
Environmental protection: wear masks on smoggy days, ventilate indoors
Meet friends or family at least once a week; social connection is vital for health
Reach out to old friends or join interest groups to build stable social relationships

lifestyle.expectedBenefit: Full lifestyle improvement can add +5-10 years

suggestions.ifAllExecuted: If all followed, expected lifespan: {{age}} years
suggestions.extension: 📈 Extension of {{years}} years compared to now
